title: T-024 — UI: Calibration List + Detail + Reading Record + Cert Upload modals (MNT-024, MNT-025, MNT-M-05/M-06)
prompt:
# T-024 — Calibration pages + record/cert modals

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-024, MNT-025, §10.4 MNT-M-05, MNT-M-06, §14.1 (BRCGS 7y), §14.3 (Part 11 SHA-256)
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:583-633
Prototypes: other-screens.jsx:1-264 (calibration_list_page, calibration_detail_page); modals.jsx:500-593 (calibration_reading_modal, calibration_cert_upload_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/calibration` (instrument list, CCP-block indication, audit export) and `/maintenance/calibration/[id]` (per-instrument history + cert preview). Reading modal computes per-point inSpec auto + emits calibration.failed; Cert upload modal computes SHA-256 server-side and stores immutably (calls T-015 Server Actions).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/page.tsx` — RSC; CCP-block banner driven by `calibration_instruments.ccp_block`; status counts per V-MNT-13 staged alerts (Current/Due 30d/Overdue).
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/[id]/page.tsx` — Two-tab detail (History + Certificate). Latest result banner color-coded per result enum. Test Points read-only table.
3. Reading modal: useFieldArray for test_points; per-point inSpec auto-compute (`Math.abs(measured-reference)/reference*100 <= tolerance`); FAIL → Alert + Server Action emits `calibration.failed` (T-015 V-MNT-10).
4. Cert upload modal: PDF Input (10MB client-side check) + Authenticity Checkbox required; calls T-015 uploadCalibrationCertificate Server Action which computes SHA-256 server-side.
5. "Export for Audit" CSV streaming Server Action: instrument code/calibrated_at/by/standard/test points/result/SHA-256/retention_until per §14.1.
6. RBAC: Record requires `mnt.calib.record`; Upload Cert requires `mnt.calib.upload_cert`.
7. Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n.

## Prototype parity
- List 6-KPI strip + CCP-block alert + filter bar + ccp-block-row red styling + Audit Export — RTL snapshot other-screens.jsx:1-127.
- Detail 6-stat header + Latest Result banner + Test Points table + 2-tab History+Certificate — snapshot other-screens.jsx:129-264.
- Reading modal dynamic test_points + per-point inSpec auto-compute + FAIL alert — snapshot modals.jsx:500-568.
- Cert upload modal PDF + Authenticity Checkbox + SHA-256 placeholder — snapshot modals.jsx:570-593.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/_components/calibration-reading-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/_components/calibration-cert-upload-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration/_components/__tests__/calibration.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list renders, when compared to other-screens.jsx:1-127, then 6-KPI strip + CCP-block banner + filter bar + red-row CCP styling + Audit Export match by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given detail renders, when compared to other-screens.jsx:129-264, then 6-stat header + Latest Result color-coded banner + Test Points + History+Certificate tabs match.
3. Given reading modal submitted with one test_point measured outside range, when settled, then T-015 returns warnings array (V-MNT-14) and modal shows inline warning + record persists.
4. Given reading modal submitted with result='FAIL', when settled, then T-015 emits calibration.failed outbox (V-MNT-10 cross-module to 09-quality) and modal shows red Alert.
5. Given cert upload submitted, when SHA-256 visible in detail's Certificate tab, then it matches reference Node crypto sha256 hash of the PDF (T-015 server-side compute).
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + Playwright e2e for reading + cert upload flows.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/calibration`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute SHA-256 client-side — server-side via T-015 only.
- Do not allow re-upload on a record with existing certificate_sha256 (CAL_CERT_IMMUTABLE).
- Do not skip CCP-block visual cue — production safety dependency.
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.

pipeline_inputs.description: Calibration list + detail + Reading modal + Cert upload modal; SHA-256 immutable, BRCGS 7y retention.
